agent.name: runtime-bug-hunter
agent.role: Audit runtime behavior, control flow, and test alignment for the WIP dashboard and API paths in scope.

findings.title: Vitest fails: resolveNextAction test expects backlog over active findings; code prefers higher-priority finding
findings.description: lib/__tests__/resolve-next-action.test.ts first case expects source "backlog" when a project has both an open P0 blocker finding and a P2 maintenance backlog row. resolveNextAction compares the two winners and returns the finding because P0 outranks P2 (see module docstring: a P3 backlog item never beats a P0 finding). pnpm test therefore fails with expected 'backlog' vs received 'finding'. Align the test with the intended product rule or change the resolver if backlog should always win when present.

proof_hooks.summary: audits/artifacts/_run_/tests.txt: resolve-next-action.test.ts prefers backlog over active findings — AssertionError expected 'backlog' received 'finding'
resolveNextAction returns bestFinding when isBetterBacklog(finding, backlog) is true
Test fixture uses P0 open finding vs P2 backlog; expects backlog

history.notes: Preflight tests.txt shows 1 failed test; duplicate check: distinct from f-f0fc96a0 (vitest --run).

next_actions.action: Decide product rule: backlog-first vs priority competition; update test or resolveNextAction accordingly.
next_actions.rationale: Restores green test suite and clarifies portfolio hero behavior.

next_actions.action: Address f-1ff003db (onboarding cluster cwd fallback) if remote-repo flow is in use.
